title: ERCOT DAM Total AS Sold CSV download
description:
The total quantity of awarded day-ahead market ancillary service offers in ERCOT. This data is hourly and published once a day for the following (operating) day.


The Ancillary Services are:
* ECRS
* Non-Spin
* Regulation
* Responsive Reserves 

Implemented on December 5th, 2025, as part of ERCOT's RTC+B project.
